description: The ApiRateLimiter does not correctly parse the rate limit from configuration, causing it to fall back to a default value.
expected_behavior: Rate limiter should read the maximum requests per minute from the configuration and enforce it.
actual_behavior: Rate limiter ignores the configuration and uses a hardcoded default.
steps_to_reproduce: Configure rate limit to 50 in appsettings.json
Observe that requests after 50 are not throttled if the hardcoded limit is higher
additional_notes: Please check RateLimiterService.cs or configuration initialization.
